blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: them all. Mrs. Gupte is specially obliged to the wives of Mr. Jogesh Chandra Dutt, J.P., Honorary Magistrate of Calcutta, Rai Bahadur Matilal Ganguli, Mrs. Jogesh Chandra Bose, Mrs. Moti Lal Bose, and Mrs. Mahendra Nath Shome—our old landlady.

blocks.label: Text
blocks.html: Mrs. Alice Elizabeth Dracott rendered very valuable assistance in examining the proofs. She is herself the author of a book styled 'Simla Village Tales.' Her experience and literary attainments, have been fully utilized in avoiding unEnglish expressions, which often creep in unobserved in works compiled by an Indian, however experienced he may be.
